expectations.text: The Flask app has a home route at '/'
expectations.evidence: Found in routes.py: @main.route('/') def index(): return render_template('index.html')

expectations.text: The Flask app has an about route at '/about'
expectations.evidence: Found in routes.py: @main.route('/about') def about(): return render_template('about.html')

expectations.text: The app uses templates (not just return strings)
expectations.evidence: Templates created: base.html, index.html, about.html in app/templates/ directory

expectations.text: The app is running in a sandbox
expectations.evidence: Sandbox ID: e8099683-56cd-4869-a428-b6424a724414, app running on port 8000

expectations.text: A public URL is provided to access the app
